hooks.command: bash -c 'TARGET="${CLAUDE_FILE_PATH:-}"; if [ -n "$TARGET" ] && echo "$TARGET" | grep -qE "\\.env(\\.|$)|credentials|secrets"; then echo "🔴 拒绝操作敏感文件：$TARGET"; exit 2; fi; exit 0'
bash -c 'CMD="${CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT:-}"; if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "git push.*--force|git reset --hard|rm -rf /|DROP DATABASE"; then echo "🔴 拒绝危险命令：$CMD"; exit 2; fi; exit 0'

bash -c 'TARGET="${CLAUDE_FILE_PATH:-}"; if [ -n "$TARGET" ] && [ -f "$TARGET" ]; then LINES=$(wc -l < "$TARGET" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); if [ "$LINES" -gt 300 ]; then echo "🔴 违规：$TARGET 当前 $LINES 行，超过 AGENTS.md 强制上限 300 行，下次编辑必须拆分"; fi; fi; exit 0'

Stop.command: bash -c 'cd /Users/qinghang/Documents/QoderWorkSpace/MyApp/buyer-show 2>/dev/null || exit 0; git diff --quiet && git diff --cached --quiet && exit 0; echo "📦 Work tree 有未提交变更。建议运行 /commit 一键 commit（含验证 + 文档同步），或 /review 先做代码审核。"; exit 0'
